productCategories.name: Tires
productCategories.description: Explore top tire brands built for performance, safety, and durability. Perfect for every ride, on any road.
productCategories.heroSummary: Explore top tire brands built for performance, safety, and durability. Perfect for every ride, on any road.
productCategories.browseSummary: Open a tire detail page to view the gallery, description, highlights, and available sizes.
productCategories.sectionSummary: Choose tires that match your ride and your lifestyle.

sections.title: PCR Tires
sections.subtitle: (Passenger Car Radial)
paragraphs: Passenger Car Radial tires are designed for everyday vehicles, providing a smooth, stable, and fuel-efficient ride on paved roads.
Ideal for city driving, highway commutes, and long-distance travel, these tires offer reliable performance, comfort, and safety for daily use.
This suits drivers with a practical and urban lifestyle, especially those who value efficiency, consistency, and dependable handling for regular journeys.

sections.title: PCLT
sections.subtitle: (Passenger Car and Light Truck)
paragraphs: Specially designed for rugged terrain, these tires offer enhanced traction, durability, and control on dirt, gravel, mud, and uneven surfaces.
Perfect for off-the-beaten-track journeys, trail rides, and outdoor exploration.
This suits riders with an adventurous lifestyle who love exploring nature, tackling challenging trails, and seeking the thrill of off-road adventures.

sections.title: TBR Tires
sections.subtitle: (Trucks and Bus Radial)
paragraphs: Truck and Bus Radial tires are engineered for heavy-duty vehicles, delivering strength, durability, and long-lasting performance on highways and commercial routes.
Designed to handle heavy loads and frequent long-distance travel, these tires are ideal for trucks, buses, and other commercial vehicles that demand reliability and stability.
This suits a professional, work-focused lifestyle where efficiency, safety, and endurance are essential for daily operations and long-haul journeys.

productCategories.name: Rims
productCategories.description: Bold wheel options for statement builds, premium street profiles, and cleaner off-road fitment.
productCategories.heroSummary: Explore wheel styles that feel premium, look confident, and keep the same strong spacing rhythm from the reference site.
productCategories.browseSummary: Wheel pages stay simple today, but the structure is ready for more fitment fields later.
productCategories.sectionSummary: Choose rims that fit the look and stance of your build.

sections.title: Street
sections.subtitle: Refined daily fitment
paragraphs: Street-focused wheel sets are designed for clean fitment, balanced proportions, and a more polished everyday look.
They work well for premium SUVs, pickups, and road-first builds that still want more personality.

sections.title: Off-road
sections.subtitle: Rugged presence
paragraphs: Off-road wheel styles add more visual weight, stronger spoke character, and a tougher stance for trail-oriented builds.
These options fit drivers who want a more assertive, adventure-ready look.

productCategories.name: Accessories
productCategories.description: Off-road accessories, brake kits, suspension, and air fresheners presented in a clean white layout.
productCategories.heroSummary: Off-road accessories, brake kits, suspension, and lifestyle add-ons built around a cleaner catalog experience.
productCategories.browseSummary: Browse the categories highlighted on the homepage, then open the detail page for the exact product line you want.
productCategories.sectionSummary: Jump straight into the accessory group you are looking for.

sections.title: Off road Accessories
sections.subtitle: Trail-ready gear
paragraphs: Lighting, recovery tools, rooftop solutions, and practical add-ons that prepare the build for more demanding routes.
This section is built for customers who want function, visibility, and stronger all-around trail utility.

sections.title: Brake Kits
sections.subtitle: Stronger stopping confidence
paragraphs: Brake kits improve control, consistency, and stopping confidence for heavier builds or more spirited driving.
This is ideal for customers who want a stronger performance feel and better confidence under load.

sections.title: Suspension
sections.subtitle: Ride height and control
paragraphs: Suspension upgrades help control body movement, improve ride posture, and support both road and trail use.
This suits drivers who want a more planted ride, a more commanding stance, or better capability off-road.

sections.title: Air Freshener
sections.subtitle: Lifestyle finishing detail
paragraphs: A small category with a strong branding role for the cabin and easy lifestyle merchandising.
It works well for simple add-on purchases, gifts, and brand-led everyday use.

notes: Local JSON mode lets the admin stage product catalog snapshots alongside page content.
Switch mode to remote-api when the supplier or ERP endpoint is ready, then treat admin product rows as fallback data.
Prefer API-based ingestion first. Move to queue-worker only when payload size or sync volume starts blocking the web app.

jobs.title: Creative Marketing Designer
jobs.summary: Turn campaigns, category launches, and event promotions into striking visual assets and landing pages.
jobs.description: Lead layout development for campaigns, design story-driven visuals for product launches, and support the website, social, and event marketing pipeline.

jobs.title: Content and Community Lead
jobs.summary: Own event coverage, product storytelling, and rider community content across the site and social channels.
jobs.description: Plan editorial calendars, cover upcoming events, coordinate with partner brands, and keep the Ridemax voice sharp across web and social.

jobs.title: Finance Officer
jobs.summary: Support reporting, reconciliations, and fast-moving operational finance for a growing automotive brand.
jobs.description: Own daily finance workflows, reporting accuracy, and coordination with the wider business and admin teams.

jobs.title: Web Operations Specialist
jobs.summary: Manage website updates, content publishing, landing pages, and admin operations across the marketing platform.
jobs.description: Maintain public pages, coordinate with marketing for releases, and help grow the internal admin and reporting workflows.
